Meme Templates

Blank customizable templates of the most popular trending and latest memes. Over 1 million templates, updated continuously.
To upload your own template, visit the Meme Generator and click "Upload new template". To create an animated GIF template, choose a video in the GIF Maker and click "Save as Template". User-uploaded templates that become popular may display on this page.
